status: draft
shortDescription: "Type parameters of generic types can be assigned primitive types"
concepts:
  - Type
  - Parameter
  - Primitive
related:
# - id: LiteralNoExpression
#   relation: Special case
inOtherPl:
# - pl: JavaScript
#   id: PrimitiveTypeParameter
# - pl: Python
#   id: PrimitiveTypeParameter
spec:
# - id: jls13
#   sections: ["11.8"]
plVersion:
# from: jls8
# to: jls14
---
A generic type like `ArrayList<T>` can be instantiated by assigning **any** type, including a primitive type, to the type parameter `T`. So one can define an array list of ints with `ArrayList<int>`.

frontmatter.shortDescription: Type parameters of generic types can be assigned primitive types
